title: Morphy Richards Powersteam Elite LED Steam Iron, Non Stick Ceramic Soleplate, 35g Output, Vertical option, Self Clean, Anti Drip, Digital Controls, 3m Cord, 3000W, Grey, Black and Red, 302012
features: User-Friendly LED Functions: Light-up pre-set functions for different fabric types, easily navigated with an ergonomically designed 'Mode' button.
Energy Efficient & Powerful: Uses 3000W per hour, providing efficient and powerful ironing.
Versatile Fabric Compatibility: Suitable for various fabrics including nylon, silk, blends, wool, cotton, and linen.
Convenient Features: Includes a 3-meter cable for easy maneuverability, a 450ml water tank for longer sessions, and a ceramic soleplate for smooth gliding.
Advanced Steam & Safety: Offers 35g/min steam output, 170g vertical steam, anti-drip, auto shut-off, self-clean, and anti-calc features for optimal performance and safety.
description: From the manufacturer Light-Up (LED) Pre-set Functions Shows temperature and steam levels; use the top 'Mode' button to switch settings. Fabric Types Works with fabrics like nylon, silk, wool, cotton, and linen. Ceramic Sole Plate The ceramic soleplate glides smoothly, ensuring top performance and fabric care. 450ml Water Tank Capacity Enables longer ironing without frequent refills, great for families. Vertical Steam Enables you to steam hanging garments and curtains effortlessly. 35g/min Steam Output A powerful 35g/min steam output makes quick work of tough wrinkles. Auto Shut-Off Offers peace of mind making it both safe and energy-efficient. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products.
